description_long: This is a military-style attack helicopter, resembling the Boeing AH-64 Apache, with a robust, angular fuselage painted in matte olive drab. The helicopter features a prominent sensor dome above the main rotor, a tandem cockpit with armored glass windows, and a nose-mounted sensor suite. Its main rotor has four long, straight blades, while the tail section includes a horizontal stabilizer and a four-bladed tail rotor mounted on the port side. The landing gear consists of two sturdy skids, and the helicopter is equipped with external weapon pylons carrying missiles and rocket pods. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible rivets, panel lines, and various antennas and sensors distributed across the airframe.
description: A military attack helicopter with a matte olive drab finish, four-bladed main and tail rotors, tandem cockpit, and external weapon pylons.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetrical spread of the main rotor blades.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the tandem cockpit, sensor dome, weapon pylons, and landing skids.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the sensor dome, cockpit windows, nose-mounted sensors, and the full span of the main rotor.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, with visible weapon pylons, cockpit, and tail structure.
attribute_rotor_blades: Four long, straight main rotor blades made of composite material, matte black in color, with no visible markings; each blade spans nearly the full width of the helicopter.
attribute_tail_rotor: Four-bladed tail rotor mounted vertically on the port side of the tail boom, black in color, with no visible markings or protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two robust, tubular landing skids made of metal, painted olive drab, with crossbars for structural support and no visible footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Multiple angular cockpit windows arranged in a tandem configuration, made of armored glass with a slight tint and black framing; no visible markings.
